identity.name: Browser — Screen Capture of Sensitive SaaS Page
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-BROWSER-005. Plane: BROWSER. Primary technique: T1113. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-BROWSER-005. Plane: BROWSER. Primary technique: T1113. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-BROWSER-005.
UC: Browser Screen-Capture Policy Enforcement / TC: Programmatic Screenshot of Sanctioned SaaS Detail Page.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-BROWSER-005 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm browser_attack_runner plugin is registered
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe browser_attack_runner \
  | jq -e '.eal_targets | length > 0'
# step-2: Drive Prisma Browser to sensitive page and attempt screen captures
cat > /tmp/sim-browser-005-eal.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-BROWSER-005
name: "Browser — screen capture"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - crm.cortexsim-test.invalid
dry_run: false
tags: [browser, screen-capture]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: browser_attack_runner
    params:
      campaign_path: scenarios/browser/campaigns/screen-capture.yml
      allowlist_host: crm.cortexsim-test.invalid
      browser_channel: prisma
      headless: true
      timeout_seconds: 90.0
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/sim-browser-005-eal.yml --live
# step-3: Confirm repeat-capture risk-score elevation
echo "[CortexSim] Confirm XSIAM: user risk score elevated after repeat screen-capture attempt."
